name: 3-step Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla with an electric mixer until well-blended.
2. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust.
3. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes, or until the center is almost set. Cool completely before refrigerating for 3 hours or overnight.
Makes 8 servings.
